mnemonics.title: Complement Mnemonic
mnemonics.content: Flip all bits, add 1 for R's, just flip for (R-1)'s

acronyms.usage: Used to represent the complement of a binary number
Used to represent the complement of a binary number

visualTips.visualization: Imagine flipping all the bits of a binary number

analogies.analogy: Finding the opposite of a number, like finding the opposite of a word in a dictionary
